labels.analysis: The MCP Server "io.github.Hoya25/nctr-mcp-server" provides 6 tools for development tools tasks.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Development Tools" assigned based on tool names and descriptions.

tools.name: search_bounties
tools.title: Search Bounties
tools.description: Search and filter available NCTR bounties. Filter by category (entry, revenue, merch, referral, engagement), minimum/maximum NCTR amount, or keyword. Returns bounty details including name, amount, lock period, and requirements. All bounties use 360LOCK — tokens stay yours after the lock period.

keyword.description: Search keyword to match against bounty name, description, or tags

repeatable_only.description: If true, only return bounties that can be earned multiple times

tools.name: get_earning_rates
tools.title: Get Earning Rates
tools.description: Get NCTR earning rates for a specific Crescendo status tier, or compare all tiers. Shows the multiplier applied to bounty earnings at each tier level. Higher tiers earn more NCTR per bounty.

tier.description: Specific tier to check. Omit to see all tiers.

bounty_id.description: Optional bounty ID to calculate tier-adjusted earning amount

tools.name: check_tier_requirements
tools.title: Check Tier Requirements
tools.description: Check what is needed to reach a specific Crescendo status tier, or see the full progression path. Shows NCTR lock thresholds, multipliers, and perks for each tier.

current_balance.description: Current NCTR balance to check tier status and progress to next tier

target_tier.description: Target tier to check requirements for

tools.name: get_active_promotions
tools.title: Get Active Promotions
tools.description: Get currently active promotions, limited-time offers, and special earning opportunities in the NCTR program.

tools.name: get_onboarding_link
tools.title: Get Onboarding Link
tools.description: Generate a link for a new member to join NCTR Alliance. Optionally include a referral code. Returns the sign-up URL and a summary of what new members earn.

referral_code.description: Optional referral code to credit the referring member

tools.name: get_impact_engines
tools.title: Get Impact Engines
tools.description: Discover NCTR Impact Engine communities. Impact Engines are passion-based communities within NCTR — each focused on a different lifestyle vertical. Members can join any Impact Engine to connect with like-minded people and access community-specific experiences.

category.description: Filter by category (Powersports, Lacrosse, Entertainment, Skilled Trades, Recovery, Wellness)
